name: Roast Chicken with Lemon Zest and Green Olive2
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a Dutch oven or roasting pan and place the chickens, breast down, in the pan.
2. In a bowl, combine ginger, paprika, bay leaves, garlic, onion, parsley, cilantro, and saffron. Spread the mixture over the chickens and season with salt and pepper to taste. Add enough water or chicken stock to cover the chickens halfway.
3. Place the pan on high heat and bring to boil.
4. Remove the pan from the heat and place it in a 400-degree oven.
5. Bake, uncovered, for 30 minutes. Turn the chickens and continue baking until very tender and golden brown, about 30 more minutes.
6. Transfer the chickens to a serving platter. Place the pan on the stove top and heat the remaining juices to boil. Add the olives and lemon zest. Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes.
7. Spoon the sauce over the chickens and serve. Makes about 8 servings.
Each serving contains approximately: 419 calories; 256 mg sodium; 130 mg cholesterol; 28 grams fat; 2 grams carbohydrates; 33 grams protein; 0.23 gram fiber.
